text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Why didn't I check more carefully...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! I'm such a silly dum-dum!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If only I'd known there was a sale on... I could've
stocked up on Toughness bars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After failing to keep up to date with the latest
sales, Ines Fujin falls into a funk.
